rschrodinger 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • rschrodinger: Schrödinger Data Bridge for R
  • Changelog

Changelog

rschrodinger 0.1.0

  • Initial release.
  • read_mae_fast(): Native R parser for Maestro .mae and .maegz files.
    • State-machine parser, zero Schrödinger dependency.
    • Automatic type conversion based on property name prefixes.
    • Prefix stripping for clean column names.
    • Directory scanning for batch processing.
    • Atom data extraction via include_atoms parameter.
  • get_protein_ligand_interactions(): Extract protein-ligand interactions via sandboxed Schrödinger Python subprocess.
  • poll_job_status(): Monitor Schrödinger HPC job status with optional blocking wait and configurable timeout.

Developed by Jixing Liu.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
